assertionResults.fullName: billsSlice reducers setBills sets items and marks status as succeeded
assertionResults.title: setBills sets items and marks status as succeeded

assertionResults.fullName: billsSlice reducers setBills with empty array sets items to [] and status to succeeded
assertionResults.title: setBills with empty array sets items to [] and status to succeeded

assertionResults.fullName: billsSlice reducers setFilterStatus sets filter.status to UE
assertionResults.title: setFilterStatus sets filter.status to UE

assertionResults.fullName: billsSlice reducers setFilterStatus resets back to all
assertionResults.title: setFilterStatus resets back to all

assertionResults.fullName: billsSlice selectors selectFilteredBills returns all bills when no search
assertionResults.title: selectFilteredBills returns all bills when no search

assertionResults.fullName: billsSlice selectors selectFilteredBills filters by id

assertionResults.fullName: billsSlice selectors selectFilteredBills sorts by date descending

assertionResults.fullName: billsSlice selectors selectBills returns raw items
